objective: Ensure public/internal boundaries, strict validation, manifest linkage, and SDK operation shape do not leak internals or teach unsafe patterns.

cases.title: Unknown public-core fields fail strict validation
cases.failureMode: Public core schema accepts hallucinated fields that alter behavior or hide assumptions.
given: A public request or result schema is marked as closed.
then: Strict validation fails with registered reason code.
No operation proceeds with silently dropped fields.

assertions.statement: Unknown public core fields fail validation.
Explicit namespaced extension slots remain allowed where defined.

cases.title: Internal operations absent from public SDK
cases.failureMode: Generated SDK exposes internal store, projection, or gate mutators.
given: SDK is generated from public contract pack.
then: Forbidden operations are absent except in negative examples/comments.

assertions.statement: No internal.* operation appears in callable SDK exports.

cases.title: OpenAPI operationIds are unique and manifest-linked
cases.failureMode: Public contract pack and public operation descriptors drift.
given: OpenAPI bundle and public surface manifest exist.
when: OperationIds and x-ofarm operation metadata are compared.
then: Every public operation has one descriptor and every descriptor maps to a contract operation or is explicitly non-HTTP.

assertions.statement: Operation identifiers are unique and manifest-linked.

cases.title: High-consequence operations advertise preflight and trace
cases.failureMode: A state-affecting or high-consequence operation can execute without preflight/trace support.
when: Descriptors with HIGH_CONSEQUENCE or PUBLICATION_AFFECTING are scanned.
then: Each has preflightRequired=true and traceRequired=true or an explicit baseline-approved exception.

assertions.statement: High-consequence operations cannot be blind writes.

cases.title: Every public non-success maps to registered reason code
cases.failureMode: Apps branch on unstructured message text or unregistered codes.
when: Public operation examples and negative cases are scanned.
then: All non-success outcomes use registered RuntimeProblem codes.

assertions.statement: No unregistered reason code appears in public examples.

cases.title: Public schema catalog excludes internal-only schemas
cases.failureMode: Agents generate app models from platform internals.
given: Public and internal schema catalogs exist.
then: Internal-only schemas are absent from public catalog except as redacted references.

assertions.statement: No PLATFORM_INTERNAL_CONTRACT is exposed as PUBLIC_REQUEST/RESULT.

cases.title: Agent tool manifest distinguishes approval-required and forbidden tools
cases.failureMode: Agent treats hints as authority or executes human-only actions.
then: Each state-affecting tool is marked requiresPreflight and approval/human limits are explicit.

assertions.statement: Agent autonomy class is present for every tool.

cases.title: SDK lacks generic truth save/update helpers
cases.failureMode: Generated helper methods bypass semantic operations and gate law.
then: No generic save/update/delete helpers exist for canonical truth, materialization, authority, promotion, or publication state.

acceptanceCriteria: Every public non-success path maps to registered RuntimeProblem codes.
No internal surfaces appear in public SDK exports.
